title: 11 herbal teas to cure oily skin for women with acne
description: Melaleuca alternifolia teas are a natural solution for oily skin. The tea contains compounds like cineole and terpinen-4-ol, which have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. These constituents help reduce oil production, soothe acne, and prevent bacterial infections that can lead to more oil and inflammation.  To get started, try drinking one to two cups of Melaleuca alternifolia tea per day. You can also use the cooled tea as a toner or apply it directly to the skin after washi...
